prompt: Write an SA Pro C# script from scratch that loops through all .psa files in C:\Planograms\Active and sets the Description field on each planogram to match the filename (without the extension).

assertions.name: uses-spacemenuassembly-namespace
assertions.description: Response contains the required SpaceMenuAssembly namespace

assertions.name: uses-spacemenuclass-classname
assertions.description: Response contains the required SpaceMenuClass class name

assertions.name: sets-description-from-filename
assertions.description: Sets Description property using Path.GetFileNameWithoutExtension or equivalent
